product_overview: BiTE is a React/TypeScript single-page learning platform that lets students register, complete Bitcoin-focused quizzes, view progress on a personalised dashboard, and earn/download rewards and certificates. The app provides student-facing flows for signup, login, quizzes, rewards, and account settings (see product overview on page 2 and key flows on pages 4–6).
core_goals: Allow new users to register and immediately begin the learning journey.
Let returning users authenticate and resume progress from a personalised dashboard.
Provide a browsable list of quizzes and a clear, stepwise quiz-taking experience with results.
Surface earned badges and downloadable certificates so students can view and save achievements.
Enable students to manage profile details and credentials, including changing passwords and logging out.

testing_rules.MANDATORY_AUTH_STRATEGY: There are NO pre-existing test accounts in the system. Every test that needs an authenticated user MUST first register a brand-new account via the /auth/signup page. Signup automatically authenticates the user upon success, so DO NOT use /auth/signin to obtain a session — it will fail because the credentials do not exist. The ONLY exception is the 'User Login' test (TC001) which MUST first signup, then logout, then signin using the same credentials that were created during signup.
testing_rules.UNIQUE_CREDENTIALS_PER_TEST: Every test run MUST generate a unique email address to avoid duplicate-email conflicts. Use a pattern like `testuser-{timestamp}@testsprite.io` where {timestamp} is a unique value (e.g. Unix milliseconds). The password should be a fixed strong value like `TestPass123!`. The name field should be `Test User`.
testing_rules.SIGNUP_FLOW: To signup: Navigate to /auth/signup -> Fill 'Test User' in the name field -> Fill the unique generated email -> Fill 'TestPass123!' in the password field -> Fill 'TestPass123!' in the confirm password field -> Click the terms of service checkbox to accept -> Click the Sign Up button. After successful signup the app automatically redirects to /u/dashboard and the user is authenticated.
testing_rules.SIGNIN_TEST_FLOW: For the signin test ONLY: First complete the full SIGNUP_FLOW above. Then logout (navigate to /u/settings and click the logout button). Then navigate to /auth/signin -> Fill the SAME email used during signup -> Fill 'TestPass123!' as password -> Click Sign In. Verify the user lands on /u/dashboard.
testing_rules.AUTHENTICATED_ROUTES: All authenticated pages are under the /u/ prefix. The correct routes are: /u/dashboard, /u/quizzes, /u/rewards, /u/settings. Do NOT navigate to /quizzes or /rewards directly — those routes do not exist and will show 404. Always use the /u/ prefix.
testing_rules.POST_AUTH_NAVIGATION: After signup completes and the user is on /u/dashboard, navigate to authenticated pages by using the sidebar navigation links (Dashboard, Quizzes, Rewards, Settings) or by navigating directly to /u/quizzes, /u/rewards, /u/settings.

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate a returning student with email and password so they can access their personalised dashboard and learning content. IMPORTANT: Since no pre-existing accounts exist, this test MUST first create an account via signup, then logout, then signin with the same credentials.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth/signup -> Fill unique credentials (name, email, password, confirm password) -> Accept terms -> Submit -> Verify redirect to /u/dashboard -> Navigate to /u/settings -> Click logout -> Verify redirect to /auth/signin -> Fill the SAME email and password used during signup -> Submit signin -> Verify redirect to /u/dashboard

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create a new student account with personal details and a secure password; on success the user is logged in and redirected to the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth/signup -> Fill in name ('Test User') -> Fill in unique email -> Fill in password ('TestPass123!') -> Confirm password ('TestPass123!') -> Accept terms checkbox -> Submit registration -> Verify redirect to /u/dashboard

features.name: View Dashboard
features.description: Show a personalised home screen after authentication with welcome message, progress summary, and quick-access CTAs. IMPORTANT: Authenticate by signing up a new account (signup auto-authenticates), do NOT use signin.
user_flows: Complete signup flow with unique credentials -> After auto-redirect to /u/dashboard -> Verify a welcome message is displayed -> Verify a progress summary card is visible

features.name: Quizzes View
features.description: Browse available Bitcoin quizzes after authentication. IMPORTANT: Authenticate by signing up first, then navigate to /u/quizzes (NOT /quizzes).
user_flows: Complete signup flow with unique credentials -> After auto-redirect to /u/dashboard -> Click sidebar link to Quizzes or navigate to /u/quizzes -> Verify the quizzes list is displayed with quiz titles and metadata

features.name: Rewards View
features.description: Display earned badges and certificates after authentication. IMPORTANT: Authenticate by signing up first, then navigate to /u/rewards (NOT /rewards).
user_flows: Complete signup flow with unique credentials -> After auto-redirect to /u/dashboard -> Click sidebar link to Rewards or navigate to /u/rewards -> Verify the rewards page loads (may show empty state for new users)

features.name: Settings View
features.description: Manage account information and credentials. IMPORTANT: Authenticate by signing up first, then navigate to /u/settings.
user_flows: Complete signup flow with unique credentials -> After auto-redirect to /u/dashboard -> Click sidebar link to Settings or navigate to /u/settings -> Verify settings page loads with profile fields -> Update first name -> Save changes -> Verify success notification

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Sign up with personal details and password

features.name: View Dashboard
features.description: Allow user to view their summary and activities

features.name: Quizzes View
features.description: Display list of quizzes available to user
user_interactions: Click on quiz to start attempt
